series_metadata.series_description: This is a licensing program for people and companies. All documents relating to people or companies such as but not limited to applications and renewals, licenses, recertification forms, exam forms, certificate of insurance, tonnage restricted use dealer reports, deposit paperwork, etc. are used in this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 3 years ; Paper: destroy after verification., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
